utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The plan provides a monthly_premium (330) and splits into physical_coverage (200) and mental_health_coverage (130), plus other details. This appears fully specified with costs. 2) property_coverage: The format requires 'home/contents insurance with costs'. The plan has 'Not applicable' and no costs, so not fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: The format requires 'travel insurance with costs'. The plan says 'Included in health plan' without separate costs; not fully specified with costs. 4) additional_services: The format requires 'any enhancement services with costs'. The plan lists services but no costs; not fully specified. 5) total_budget: The format requires 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'. The plan provides monthly_cost and annual_cost and an extra savings field; this is fully specified. Therefore, 2 of 5 items are fully specified with costs.
